title: REINDEX results in "UNIQUE constraint failed" for generated column
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 AS (0 = UNLIKELY(c1)) UNIQUE, c1 TEXT);
key_bug_features: REINDEX causes UNIQUE constraint failure on generated column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 AS (c1 IS NOT NULL) UNIQUE, c1 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 AS (c1 + 1) UNIQUE, c1 TEXT);
